prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic Instagram milestone celebration poster featuring a stylish teenage boy inspired by the uploaded reference image. Maintain the same fashion aesthetic, hairstyle, outfit style, colors, and overall vibe.

Include two versions of the same character: ✨ A stylish upper-body portrait looking sideways in the top-right corner. ✨ A full-body pose sitting on giant metallic 3D text reading “UNLIMITED” at the bottom center.

Use cinematic orange and golden lighting, glowing bokeh effects, and a luxury urban night atmosphere. Focus on ultra-detailed facial features, realistic skin texture, sharp jawline, volumetric lighting, and premium fashion photography quality.

Add bold typography with the title “Unlimited Mindset”, motivational quotes, a signature-style logo, crown doodles, metallic text effects, depth of field, dramatic shadows, and high-contrast visuals.

Style: Instagram influencer poster, luxury branding aesthetic, 4K ultra-realistic quality, trending AI art style. 🚀🔥
